self_improvement.claim: Directive Workspace can keep the progressive Engine stage-chaining path real by proving it in a permanent focused check instead of relying on ad hoc inspection.
self_improvement.mechanism: This DEEP bounded result opens one verification slice that exercises staged extraction, adaptation, improvement, proof, and integration through DirectiveEngine.processSource().
self_improvement.baseline_observation: Before this DEEP case, the staged Engine path existed in code but only had ad hoc command-level verification.
self_improvement.expected_effect: The repo check suite will permanently catch regressions in the progressive planning path without reopening Runtime or host work.

decision.rationale: The staged Engine path is now valuable enough that it should have its own focused permanent verification slice.
decision.runtime_threshold_check: yes - the mechanism is still valuable without a runtime surface, so Architecture should retain product-owned value
